programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.desc: Matron Shipley arrives back unexpectedly and is horrified to learn that there is an imposter in the San! It's not long before Darrell and Sally uncover the surprising truth about the mysterious Nurse Jane...

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: Bridgette gets the hiccups and becomes desperate to get rid of them.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Battle ensues when the pigs muscle in on Shaun's private club and steal all the pizza. Shaun, Bitzer and the flock mount a rescue mission for Timmy who the pigs have taken hostage.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.sub-title: What a Night for a Dark Knight!
programme.desc: In Gotham City, Batman refuses the help of Mystery, Inc.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: After a chemical spill, the girls and Mojo find themselves trapped together.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin and Sora sneak out of the Monastery to attend the Crossroads Carnival and uncover a villainous plot that puts their new training to the test.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: Robby's cyber-sleeve illness threatens his life, so Mo renounces ever touching the Emberstone. Quintus Prime shows Mo why she's the hero her family needs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Santa Claus is coming to town. Unfortunately, he is run over by the Wattersons, so it's up to them to save Christmas.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: Oscar must get Hedgehog a special sandwich in order to save their friendship.

programme.title: 100% Wolf: Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: When Scarlet's parents decide to leave Milford, Freddy and the other kids stage a fake werewolf sighting to keep them in town.

programme.title: My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic
programme.desc: When Discord invites Fluttershy to his realm for tea, he worries she won't be comfortable there and begins to change it and himself with disastrous results.

programme.title: Space Nova
programme.desc: The Novas call on their allies to help travel through a dangerous nebula, and reach Ziggy before it's too late!

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When an ancient prophecy spells doom for Townsville, the girls must race to stop it.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Clark's life falls apart as The General goes into hiding in Clark's flat. Jimmy struggles with being a leader, and Lois goes toe-to-toe with Vicki Vale as they track down missing scientists.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Ladybug and Cat Noir face a villain determined to steal their thunder; will the superheroes weather the storm?

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Wallace fancies some nice cheese but the cupboard is bare, so Wallace must search further afield. Soon our plasticine heroes are off on a trip in a homemade rocket to a place that is all cheese - the moon!

programme.title: Little Lunch
programme.desc: When Rory is punished and sent to the Principal's office, the other kids surprisingly feel sorry for him and try to cheer him up.

programme.title: Caper Crew
programme.sub-title: Know What Your Mark Wants to Hear
programme.desc: While Amelia competes with her nemesis for school captain, her mysterious grandmother Queenie turns up out of the blue. Is she here to find the lost Woodspring Nug?

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil takes on a two-bed terrace in one of the toughest property markets in the UK as he heads to Syston in the East Midlands.

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: Abby searches for her AWOL brother, who may have bipolar disorder, and meets with their mother to prevent Eric's court-martial. Elizabeth treats a family who were severely injured after being hit by a drunk truck driver.

programme.title: You Can't Ask That
programme.desc: Muslims answer the questions Australians wanted to ask but were too embarrassed or afraid to ever ask in person.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice
programme.desc: Satirist Mark Humphries joins Alice in the kitchen to talk up the virtues of anchovies before Alice tries to impress Mark with beetroot - not the easiest task.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Award-winning host Stephen Fry wrangles a stellar panel of comedians in the world's most impossible quiz show. Panellists are Alan Davies, Rich Hall, Josie Lawrence and Josh Sessions.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.sub-title: Stephen Hendry, Laura Whitmore, Maisie Adam & Chris McCausland
programme.desc: Joining Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell for this episode's tall tales are guests Stephen Hendry, Laura Whitmore, Chris McCausland and Maisie Adam.

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: The MythBusters do a fan correspondence catch-up as the team answers your questions and takes mini myth requests - testing if you can eat a spoonful of cinnamon without drinking water and more.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: In Radcliffe, Greater Manchester, Phil meets the Young family to cast his eye over their property and try to get them a buyer.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a master craftsman whose dream is to build a castle made entirely of mud.

programme.title: Spicks and Specks
programme.sub-title: Genevieve Lemon, Josh Lawson, Gerry Beckley & Frank Woodley
programme.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Gerry Beckley, Genevieve Lemon, Josh Lawson, and Frank Woodley.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig delves into the topic of Questions and Qualifications, with regular panellist Alan Davies, and guest players Ade Adepitan, Nish Kumar, and Holly Walsh.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.sub-title: Jo Brand, Simon Day, Kiri Pritchard-McClean & Henning Wehn
programme.desc: Guests Jo Brand, Simon Day, Kiri Pritchard-McClean and Henning Wehn join Lee Mack and David Mitchell.

programme.title: Wild Isles
programme.desc: David Attenborough follows Britain's woodlands throughout the year, showcasing their astonishing variety and unearthing incredible stories hidden amongst the trees.

programme.title: The Piano
programme.desc: It's concert time for the five chosen pianists, where they'll be headlining an extraordinary concert at the prestigious City Recital Hall in Sydney.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: Abby races to stop Maggie from taking Eric out of treatment. An abandoned baby brings painful memories for Chen, Pratt treats a patient with a terrible secret, and Susan helps a woman who is being beaten up by her son.

programme.title: Offsiders
programme.desc: More than just the action on the field, Offsiders tackles the week in sport from all angles - from business, politics, marketing, the fans, society, culture, history and the athletes' perspective. Presented by Abbey Gelmi.

programme.title: W1A
programme.desc: Ian Fletcher has finally got his own office. He and the team have a new set of challenges, not least an impending visit from Prince Charles. The question is, which of the team will get the honour of shaking the royal hand?

programme.title: rage
programme.desc: Australia's longest-running music show is home to the biggest vault of music videos from a diverse range of artists, genres, and eras. They curate the best clips of all-time to entertain for hours.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Professional and personal dramas encircle the family, overshadowing Ava's birthday. An ambitious Ally sets out to save the company, while Paul wonders if he ever had any ambition to start with.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Pressures from all three generations of the family cause lids to blow off. Paul is forced by his new boss to make funding cuts, and following her attempt to impress Ava, Ally tells Paul some home truths.

programme.title: Small Town Scandal
programme.desc: Toby pauses his probe for dinner with his old crush and her bully-turned-husband - only to learn his dad is now the top suspect. A garage discovery throws everything into doubt.

programme.title: The Messenger
programme.desc: Ed must confront just how far he'll go to complete the card and comes to realise the messages may be coming from someone very close.

programme.title: ABC News Update
programme.desc: The news headlines updating the day's top stories from across Australia and around the world.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Award-winning host Stephen Fry wrangles a stellar panel of comedians in the world's most impossible quiz show. Panellists are Alan Davies, Rich Hall, Josie Lawrence and Josh Sessions.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: Britain's strongest woman, Andrea Thompson, joins the doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibres work, and say hello to three more incredible Ouch Award finalists.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: The doctors investigate how the lungs move inside one's rib cage with the help of a massive water slide; the British Sign Language sign is 'dinosaur'.

programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.desc: Darrell is excited to welcome her younger sister to Malory Towers, but when Felicity befriends Alicia's mischievous cousin, Darrell's infamous temper threatens to erupt.

programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.desc: Felicity and June learn about possible treasure at Malory Towers, while Darrell's leadership skills are put to the test organising a welcome party for the wayward First Formers.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: Duncan is determined to stop the musical duo Bananas and Cheese from coming to the day care.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Timmy decides to help the hedgehogs find a resting place for the night. His efforts, however, lead his weary friends into a series of scrapes rather than giving them a good night's sleep.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Cabinet of Professor Madds Markson!
programme.desc: The gang meet Penn and Teller in a haunted hotel.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Buttercup must go it alone to save her family from a kidnapping.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: When Boog gets back to see the Camp in disarray, he learns that Elliot has started charging everyone rent and has become the richest resident of Camp Wild, while everyone else now works for him.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: At Alice's dress-up party the campers are magically turned into their costumes.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin learn that getting a family heirloom back from an old man is harder than one might think.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin takes the other Titans on a trip through the dizzying world of quantum physics.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin elects to become a cat so Starfire will love him.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: While Adrien wonders how to be as surprising as Marinette, Kagami and Felix wonder how to avoid unpleasant surprises. But a supervillain will upset the plans of the four teenagers.

programme.title: Unikitty
programme.desc: When Unikitty finds an old, beaten recliner on the curb, she sees its inner beauty and brings it home to introduce to the gang!

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: Liko, Roy, and Dot finally find Kleavor of the Six Heroes - and it wants to battle!

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: Diana returns and tells the Rising Volt Tacklers about the true origin of the Explorers.

programme.title: Let's Dance
programme.desc: Learn about Locking in a hip-hop-inspired routine with Miss Kylie.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Numberblocks Five and Two are in their toy library, but all their favourite toys are in a mess. Can their new friend Sorty the Super Sorter help sort out their problem?

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Otis and Olympia accept a challenge to switch jobs with the maintenance department for a day.

programme.title: Understanding Numbers
programme.desc: Learn how to accurately count a collection of less than 20 objects, explore common mistakes and practise counting with appropriate strategies.

programme.title: Bitesize Daily
programme.desc: Hours and half hours, quarter hours, counting forward in time.

programme.title: WOW! That's Amazing
programme.desc: Owain and Tilly explore the bubbly science behind burping, meet the robot taking the art world by storm, find out how a playing card can defy gravity and discover driverless cars!

programme.title: SciGirls
programme.desc: When St. Louis' SciGirls find the amphibian population in decline, they hop to it! Alanna and her friends hit urban and rural sites to compare frog and toad calls and report on their amphibian neighbours.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work
programme.desc: Dr Karl crunches into the crispy, salty, science packed world of chips, proving there's more to one of the nation's favourite treats than meets the mouth.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: In Radcliffe, Greater Manchester, Phil meets the Young family to cast his eye over their property and try to get them a buyer.

programme.title: W1A
programme.desc: Anna puts herself forward for the newly advertised role of Head of Better, while Matt continues to tinker unhelpfully with Lucy's as-yet-uncommissioned drama project, Home Truth.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James faces an uncertain future when he's grounded in the RAF while Mrs Hall and Helen get stuck into the community war effort.

programme.title: Wild Isles
programme.desc: David Attenborough follows Britain's woodlands throughout the year, showcasing their astonishing variety and unearthing incredible stories hidden amongst the trees.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: Abby races to stop Maggie from taking Eric out of treatment. An abandoned baby brings painful memories for Chen, Pratt treats a patient with a terrible secret, and Susan helps a woman who is being beaten up by her son.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Joining QI master Stephen Fry are Helen Atkinson-Wood, Andy Hamilton, Bill Bailey and Alan Davies to discuss creatures. Each of the panellists has been given animal noise buzzers.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.sub-title: Mel Giedroyc, David Haye, Martin Kemp & Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: Rob Brydon is joined by regular team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack plus Mel Giedroyc, David Haye, Martin Kemp and Romesh Ranganathan.

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie return to the Old Wild West for a quick draw gun-slinging story while Grant, Tory and Jessi hop on board the Mythbus.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil is in the market town of Bishop's Stortford taking on a house that's been on the market for six months with hardly a sniff of a buyer.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Two die-hard Londoners throw in their urban media jobs and move lock, stock and barrel to country Newbury where they build a spectacular 21st-century, flint-covered farmhouse, and establish a microbrewery to boot.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Richard Osman hosts as lexicographer Susie Dent, newsreader Nick Owen, alpine ski racer Chemmy Alcott and comedian Dane Baptiste test their general knowledge skills.

programme.title: Spicks and Specks
programme.sub-title: Jeff Lang, Rhonda Burchmore, Adam Rozenbachs & Dave O'Neil
programme.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Jeff Lang, Rhonda Burchmore, Adam Rozenbachs and Dave O'Neill.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry lumps together a whole lot of L-themed larks, from lava lamps to love handles. With David Mitchell, Ronni Ancona, Jimmy Carr and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Previously unseen material from the comedy panel show, with a host of celebrity guests.

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: As Christian's nemesis (and the detectives) close in on Christian, the truth behind their shared history is revealed. Frank edges close to reconciliation with Margaret, while John risks permanent estrangement from his Dad.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.sub-title: The Many Mouths of Andrew Colville
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson investigate a serial killer known for biting his victims who appears to be killing again, even though he was presumed dead.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: In this unique episode, events leading up to Christmas are shown in reverse chronological order. Luka's speeding causes a crash on an icy road, while ER staff treat angry elves and a female hockey player with a head injury.

programme.title: W1A
programme.desc: Anna puts herself forward for the newly advertised role of Head of Better, while Matt continues to tinker unhelpfully with Lucy's as-yet-uncommissioned drama project, Home Truth.

programme.title: rage
programme.desc: Australia's longest-running music show is home to the biggest vault of music videos from a diverse range of artists, genres, and eras. They curate the best clips of all-time to entertain for hours.

programme.title: The Little Things
programme.desc: Kern County Sheriff's Deputy Joe \.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: The program is back with host Sandi Toksvig. On the panel are comedians Alan Davies, Cariad Lloyd, Romesh Ranganathan and Phill Jupitus.

programme.title: If You're Listening
programme.desc: Trump's Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller is a key driver behind his draconian immigration policy. So, who is this dude?

programme.title: ABC News Update
programme.desc: The news headlines updating the day's top stories from across Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Richard Osman hosts as lexicographer Susie Dent, newsreader Nick Owen, alpine ski racer Chemmy Alcott and comedian Dane Baptiste test their general knowledge skills.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: It's milkshake time in the lab as the doctors investigate how blood travels around the body, and seeing if their own ideas for brilliant blood vessel machines will impress the minis.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: In a poptastic demonstration, the doctors put the acoustic reflex to the test with an enormous balloon; a serious case of snotting awaits the loser of Ouchology.

programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.desc: Gwen learns Clarissa has been keeping a big secret after she falls ill during a lacrosse game. Meanwhile, Irene hears that her father has a new love interest.
